import ads1 from '../assets/ads-images/content-ads/ads1.gif'
import ads2 from '../assets/ads-images/content-ads/ads2.gif'
import ads3 from '../assets/ads-images/content-ads/ads3.gif'
import ads4 from '../assets/ads-images/content-ads/ads4.gif'
import ads5 from '../assets/ads-images/content-ads/ads5.gif'

export const AdsData = [
  { ads: ads1 , size: "small", id: 1},
  { ads: ads2 , size: "small", id: 2},
  { ads: ads3 , size: "small", id: 3},
  { ads: ads4 , size: "big", id: 4},
  { ads: ads5 , size: "big", id: 5},
];
